vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #762: centralize roadmap phase taxonomy in PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json; update roadmap_render.py to read from there.

plan.title: feat(vbrief): centralize phase taxonomy in PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json; renderer reads from there

narratives.Description: Add a phases array to vbrief/PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json (canonical phase names + descriptions). Update scripts/roadmap_render.py to source phase headings/descriptions from there in preference to per-vBRIEF x-migrator fields. Eliminates the 'first-vBRIEF-wins' fragility that loses Phase descriptions when the carrier brief moves out of pending/. Adds drift-detection warning when a brief's Phase value does not match the canonical taxonomy.
narratives.Acceptance: PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json carries the canonical phase taxonomy; roadmap_render.py reads from there first with per-vBRIEF fields as fallback; task roadmap:render produces stable phase descriptions regardless of which vBRIEFs are in pending/; vbrief:validate warns on phase-name drift.

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Near-up structural priority -- post-cutover stabilization, structural unblockers (items gating many others), and cross-cutting items whose effect spans multiple skills, strategies, or files.
x-migrator.Description: Centralize roadmap phase taxonomy in PROJECT-DEFINITION; renderer change.

references.title: Issue #762: feat(vbrief): centralize phase taxonomy in PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json; renderer reads from there
